title: Audit cold legacy tarballs for the .chronical.json typo
description: The 2026-03-23 e7e34f2a 'Migrate identities from 0.5.0 to 0.6.0' commit had a typo: it created '.chronical.json' (missing 'e' — should be '.chronicle.json'). The typo was fixed at some later point in active surfaces (no .chronical files remain on the live substrate as of 2026-05-12). But cold backups, harvest tarballs, and rolled-up archives from between 2026-03-23 and the typo-fix commit may still carry .chronical.json files. If anyone restores from one of those backups, they'll resurrect the typo. Sweep all archived/cold storage paths (private/universal/substrate/harvest/, .wrkstrm/backups/, any operator-side harvest directories, any .tar.gz or .zip backup bundles) for files matching 'chronical' and rename or note them. Low priority — only matters if a restore happens.
